name: Flank Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the meat tenderizer according to the instructions on the label.
2. Place the garlic through a press and rub it onto the steak along with freshly ground pepper.
3. Mix together the soy sauce, vermouth, and Tabasco sauce in a small bowl.
4. Pour the mixture over the steak, ensuring it is evenly coated.
5. Marinate the steak for at least 2 hours, or longer if time allows.
6. Broil under very high heat for 3 to 4 minutes on each side until the steak reaches a rare temperature.
7. Serve and carve the steak diagonally.
Serves: 4
